<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\CssSelector\Parser\Handler; use Symfony\Component\CssSelector\Parser\Reader; use Symfony\Component\CssSelector\Parser\TokenStream; /** * CSS selector comment handler. * * This component is a port of the Python cssselect library, * which is copyright Ian Bicking, @see https://github.com/SimonSapin/cssselect. * * @author Jean-François Simon <jeanfrancois.simon@sensiolabs.com> * * @internal */ class CommentHandler implements HandlerInterface { public function handle(Reader $reader, TokenStream $stream): bool { if ('/*' !== $reader->getSubstring(2)) { return false; } $offset = $reader->getOffset('*/'); if (false === $offset) { $reader->moveToEnd(); } else { $reader->moveForward($offset + 2); } return true; } }
